name: Homepage loads and displays hero content
description: When a user visits the HMX Accounting homepage, the hero section renders with the main headline, a call-to-action button, and navigation is visible.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the homepage at https://hmx-accountants.netlify.app
Verify the hero section is visible with a main headline and at least one call-to-action button or link in the hero area

name: Navigation links route to correct pages
description: When a user clicks the main navigation links from the homepage, they are routed to the correct pages (About, Services, Pricing, Contact).

planSteps.description: Navigate to the homepage at https://hmx-accountants.netlify.app
Click the Services navigation link in the main navigation menu
Verify the Services page content is displayed with relevant service information
Click the Pricing navigation link in the main navigation menu
Verify the Pricing page loads showing pricing plans or packages
Click the About navigation link in the main navigation menu
Verify the About page loads with information about HMX Accounting

name: Contact page form accepts and submits user input
description: When a user fills in the contact form on the Contact page with their name, email, and message and submits it, they receive a confirmation or success response.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the contact page at https://hmx-accountants.netlify.app/contact
Fill in the name field with a test name
Fill in the email field with a valid test email address
Fill in the message field with a test message
Submit the contact form by clicking the send or submit button
Verify a success message or confirmation is shown to the user after form submission

name: Contact page form shows validation errors for empty fields
description: When a user submits the contact form without filling in required fields, the form displays validation error messages prompting them to complete the required fields.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the contact page at https://hmx-accountants.netlify.app/contact
Submit the contact form without filling in any fields
Verify that validation error messages appear on the form indicating which required fields need to be completed

name: HMRC Tax Calculator computes and displays tax estimate
description: When a user enters their income on the HMRC Tax Calculator page and calculates their tax, the tool displays an estimated tax breakdown.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the HMRC tax calculator page at https://hmx-accountants.netlify.app/hmrc-tax-calculator
Enter an income amount into the income input field
Submit or trigger the tax calculation
Verify the calculator displays a tax estimate or breakdown result in the calculator output area

name: Pricing page displays pricing plans with clear details
description: When a user visits the Pricing page, they can see pricing tiers or packages with clear descriptions and prices laid out in a readable format.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the pricing page at https://hmx-accountants.netlify.app/pricing
Verify the pricing page displays at least one pricing plan or package with a visible price and description, laid out in card or structured format

name: Services page lists all offered services
description: When a user visits the Services page, they can see a list or grid of accounting services offered by HMX Accounting with descriptions.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the services page at https://hmx-accountants.netlify.app/services
Verify the services page displays multiple service offerings, each with a title and description, arranged in a list or grid layout

name: About page displays company information and credentials
description: When a user visits the About page, they see information about HMX Accounting including professional credentials such as AAT licensed or HMRC recognised status.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the about page at https://hmx-accountants.netlify.app/about
Verify the about page displays company information and professional credentials or qualifications such as AAT or HMRC recognition

name: Footer contains essential links and contact information
description: When a user scrolls to the footer on any page, they can see essential links and contact information for HMX Accounting.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the homepage at https://hmx-accountants.netlify.app
Scroll to the bottom of the page to reveal the footer
Verify the footer contains navigation links and contact information or company details, displayed in a structured footer layout

name: Site is responsive on mobile viewport
description: When the site is viewed on a mobile-sized viewport, the navigation collapses into a mobile menu and the hero content remains readable.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the homepage at https://hmx-accountants.netlify.app
Resize the browser viewport to a mobile width (375px wide)
Verify the navigation changes to a mobile-friendly layout such as a hamburger menu or collapsed navigation, and the hero content remains visible and readable on the mobile viewport
